allow: Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/synology_deploy printing114-web "sudo -n /usr/local/bin/docker run --rm photocafe-web:new grep -r ''api.printing114\\|1.212.201.147'' /app/apps/web/.next/server/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo ''grep 실패''")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/synology_deploy printing114-web "sudo -n /usr/local/bin/docker run --rm photocafe-web:new sh -c ''grep -r ""1\\.212\\.201\\.147"" /app/apps/web/.next/server/chunks/ 2>/dev/null | head -3''")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/synology_deploy printing114-web "sudo -n /usr/local/bin/docker run --rm photocafe-web:new sh -c ''grep -r ""api.printing114\\|1.212.201.147"" /app/apps/web/.next/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v Binary | head -5''")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''Ports:'', d.get\(''PortBindings''\)\); print\(''Network:'', d.get\(''NetworkMode''\)\); print\(''Env:'', [e for e in \(d.get\(''Env''\) or []\) if ''API'' in e or ''NODE'' in e]\)")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/synology_deploy printing114-web "sudo -n /usr/local/bin/docker run -d   --name photocafe-web   --restart always   -p 3000:3000   --network $NETWORK   -e NODE_ENV=production   -e TZ=Asia/Seoul   -e INTERNAL_API_URL=http://photocafe-api:3001   -e NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://api.printing114.com/api/v1   photocafe-web:new")
